idea-plugin.name: Mermaid Preview
idea-plugin.description:
Mermaid diagrams, rendered live inside your Markdown files

Open any .md, .markdown, .mdx, or standalone .mmd / .mermaid file and every fenced mermaid block appears rendered in a side tool window — with a per-block toggle to flip between the source code and the rendered diagram.

Features

  • Auto-detect every ```mermaid block in the active file.
  • Per-block toggle: Diagram ↔ Code.
  • Export: download each diagram as SVG or PNG, copy the source to the clipboard.
  • Actionable error overlay: syntax errors show the mermaid parser message and highlight the offending line.
  • Click-to-jump: click a block header to navigate the editor to that block's line.
  • Inline inlays: rendered SVG previews appear directly below each closing fence in the editor.
  • Gutter icon: a diagram icon appears next to each opening fence — click to focus the tool window.
  • Standalone .mmd / .mermaid files treated as a single diagram.
  • Live refresh on file switch and as you type (250 ms debounce).
  • Dark / light theme follows your IDE preference.
  • 100% offline — mermaid 10.9.3 is bundled. No network calls, ever.

Supported diagram types

Everything mermaid 10.x supports: flowcharts, sequence diagrams, state diagrams, class diagrams, ER diagrams, gantt charts, pie charts, git graphs, user journeys, mindmaps, quadrant charts, and timelines.

Links

  • Source on GitHub
  • Issue tracker
  • Demo file with 12 sample diagrams

Made by SlothLabs — part of the CloudOrbit / DataOrbit / BastionOrbit / ProxyOrbit / WattsOrbit family.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.0 — May 2026

  • New: click-to-jump — click any block header in the tool window to navigate the editor to that line.
  • New: inline inlays — rendered SVG previews appear directly below each closing fence in the editor.
  • New: gutter icon on every ```mermaid opening fence — click to focus the tool window.
  • New: standalone .mmd and .mermaid files supported (treated as a single block).
  • New: scroll position preserved across refreshes — the panel no longer jumps to the top on every edit.
  • Unit tests for MermaidBlockExtractor.

0.1.2 — May 2026

  • First JetBrains Marketplace release.
  • Longer description, plugin icon, change-notes, verifyPlugin config.

0.1.1 — May 2026

  • New: per-block SVG / PNG / Copy source actions.
  • New: actionable error overlay (highlights offending line, shows mermaid parser message).

0.1.0 — May 2026

  • Initial release — tool window, toggle, debounced refresh, bundled mermaid 10.9.3.
